style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

composed_prompt:

RIGHT panel labelled « DE NOMBREUX BÂTISSEURS »: four small workbench boxes each labelled « BÂTISSEUR » with a small toolkit icon, building in parallel beneath a horizontal bar labelled « CONTRÔLES CENTRAUX ».
